exceptions.rationale: Forge 7.11.2 depends on @electron/rebuild 3.x and Electron's node-gyp fork, which still resolves tar 6.2.1. A forced tar major override could break the Windows node-pty rebuild.

exceptions.scope: Development-only Electron Forge interactive CLI chain
exceptions.rationale: Forge CLI reaches tmp 0.0.33 through Inquirer and external-editor. The application does not ship or invoke this build-time prompt chain.
